title: Make Me Shapeless
description: Datapack that makes a few of vanilla recipes shapeless, allowing you to craft them in inventory 4-space crafting.
body:
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/8QHffI0K?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=blueviolet) ![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1056187?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=Datapack%20Downloads&color=blueviolet) ![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1470058?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=Mod%20Downloads&&color=blueviolet) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/8QHffI0K?style=for-the-badge&label=Latest%20release&color=chartreuse) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/AI-AI?style=for-the-badge&label=Never%20by&color=red) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord%20server%20-%20Discord?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Join%20the&color=royalblue&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FDGVD6wBTDF)](https://discord.gg/DGVD6wBTDF)
# About Datapack / Mod **Make Me Shapeless (MMS)** is a datapack / mod that changes few vanilla recipes. It makes them shapeless and that allows you to craft them faster with shift-clicking and also craft them in the 2x2 inventory crafting space. ## Recipes This datapack / mod changes **14** recipes to their shapeless variant. If you think I should modify more recipes, contact me on the **Discord**, which you can find on the left panel. ## Future datapack / mod support and backporting This datapack / mod will be updated once every **full** release of Minecraft as soon as possible. I do not plan on backporting this datapack / mod, unless requested on **Discord**, but you can only request backporting to 1.20.x. I won't be backporting to older versions. ## Compatibility with mods or plugins If you know a mod or plugin that could use some shapeless recipes, let me know on the **Discord** and I will make an add-on (separate project in this case)!
